tasks.name: Create SkipLink component
tasks.purpose: Provide keyboard users with ability to skip navigation and jump directly to main content

constraints: Component must be visually hidden by default
Must become visible on keyboard focus
Must use semantic anchor tag with href
Must follow existing project styling patterns

tasks.input_state: No skip link exists in marketing layout
tasks.output_state: SkipLink component exists with proper focus styling and accessibility attributes
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders visually hidden link that becomes visible on Tab focus

tasks.name: Wire SkipLink to marketing layout
tasks.purpose: Integrate SkipLink as first focusable element and add main content landmark

constraints: SkipLink must be first element in layout
Main element must have id='main-content'
Must not break existing layout structure

tasks.input_state: Marketing layout exists without skip link, homepage has no main landmark
tasks.output_state: SkipLink renders at top of layout, homepage main has id='main-content'
tasks.acceptance_criterion: SkipLink is first element and main content has proper id attribute
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'SkipLink' apps/web/app/(marketing)/layout.tsx && grep -q 'id="main-content"' apps/web/app/(marketing)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add MotionConfig wrapper to marketing layout
tasks.purpose: Enable automatic reduced motion handling for all Framer Motion animations

constraints: Must wrap children with MotionConfig
Must set reducedMotion='user' prop
Must not interfere with existing layout structure

tasks.input_state: Marketing layout has no MotionConfig wrapper
tasks.output_state: Marketing layout wraps children with MotionConfig reducedMotion='user'
tasks.acceptance_criterion: MotionConfig wraps layout children with reducedMotion='user' prop
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'import.*MotionConfig.*framer-motion' apps/web/app/(marketing)/layout.tsx && grep -q 'reducedMotion="user"' apps/web/app/(marketing)/layout.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add motion-reduce variants to BlogPostCard
tasks.purpose: Disable hover overlay animation when user prefers reduced motion

constraints: Add motion-reduce:transition-none to hover overlay
Card should remain functional without animation
Must not affect non-reduced-motion users

tasks.input_state: BlogPostCard has hover animation without reduced motion support
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Hover overlay has motion-reduce:transition-none Tailwind variant

tasks.name: Add reduced motion to LogoMarquee
tasks.purpose: Pause marquee animation when user prefers reduced motion

constraints: Use useReducedMotion hook to detect preference
Set Marquee speed to 0 when reduced motion is preferred
Logos should remain visible when paused

tasks.input_state: LogoMarquee animates without checking reduced motion preference
tasks.output_state: LogoMarquee pauses (speed=0) when prefers-reduced-motion is enabled
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component uses useReducedMotion and conditionally sets Marquee speed prop

tasks.name: Add reduced motion to StickyScrollReveal
tasks.purpose: Disable scroll-triggered opacity animations when user prefers reduced motion

constraints: Use useReducedMotion hook to detect preference
Disable opacity animations in motion.div when reduced motion
Content should remain readable without animation

tasks.input_state: StickyScrollReveal animates without checking reduced motion preference
tasks.output_state: StickyScrollReveal shows content without animations when prefers-reduced-motion
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component uses useReducedMotion and conditionally applies opacity animations

tasks.name: Add reduced motion to ContainerScroll
tasks.purpose: Disable 3D perspective animations when user prefers reduced motion

constraints: Use useReducedMotion hook to detect preference
Disable rotate, scale, and translate animations when reduced motion
Container should display static when animations disabled

tasks.input_state: ContainerScroll animates without checking reduced motion preference
tasks.output_state: ContainerScroll shows static content when prefers-reduced-motion is enabled
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component uses useReducedMotion and conditionally applies transform animations

tasks.name: Add global reduced motion CSS rules
tasks.purpose: Provide fallback CSS for any animations not handled by Framer Motion

constraints: Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) rule
Disable transitions and animations globally
Must not break layout or functionality

tasks.input_state: globals.css has no prefers-reduced-motion media query
tasks.output_state: globals.css contains @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) with animation overrides
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Media query exists with transition-duration and animation-duration set to 0.01ms
tasks.verification_command: grep -q '@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)' apps/web/styles/globals.css && grep -q 'transition-duration.*animation-duration' apps/web/styles/globals.css && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Verify WCAG AA contrast ratios
tasks.purpose: Ensure all text meets 4.5:1 contrast ratio requirement

dependencies: Browser DevTools or axe DevTools extension
constraints: Run automated contrast checks using axe or Lighthouse
Verify text-muted-foreground meets 4.5:1
Document any failures for manual review

tasks.output_state: Contrast ratios verified via automated tooling, issues documented
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Lighthouse accessibility score includes contrast checks, no major violations
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && echo 'Manual: Run npx lighthouse http://localhost:3000 --only-categories=accessibility --output=json | jq .categories.accessibility.score'

tasks.name: Verify keyboard navigation
tasks.purpose: Ensure all interactive elements are reachable via Tab key

constraints: Tab through entire homepage
Verify skip link works
Verify all buttons and links are focusable
Verify focus indicators are visible

tasks.output_state: All interactive elements verified keyboard accessible with visible focus
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Tab order is logical, skip link works, all elements have focus indicators
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && echo 'Manual: Tab through homepage at http://localhost:3000, verify skip link and focus indicators'

tasks.name: Verify image alt text
tasks.purpose: Ensure all images have descriptive alt attributes

constraints: Check all Image components have alt props
Verify alt text is descriptive (not empty or 'image')
Decorative images should have alt=''
Use grep to find images without alt

tasks.output_state: All images verified to have proper alt attributes
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All Image components have non-empty alt or empty for decorative
tasks.verification_command: grep -rn '<Image' apps/web/app/(marketing)/ | grep -v 'alt=' && echo 'FAIL: Images without alt' || echo 'PASS: All images have alt' && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Test reduced motion in browser
tasks.purpose: Verify all animations respect prefers-reduced-motion setting

constraints: Enable prefers-reduced-motion in DevTools
Verify logo marquee pauses
Verify sticky scroll has no opacity transitions
Verify container scroll is static
Verify blog card hover has no animation

tasks.output_state: All animations verified to respect prefers-reduced-motion
tasks.acceptance_criterion: With reduced motion enabled, no distracting animations occur
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && echo 'Manual: Chrome DevTools > Rendering > Emulate CSS media feature prefers-reduced-motion: reduce, verify animations disabled'
